title: GIS and Environmental Specialist
description:
About ORCD
Organization for Research and Community Development (ORCD) is a national Afghan NGO registered in 2011. It has delivered more than 119 projects worth over USD 69 million across 31 provinces in health, nutrition, WASH, food security, agriculture, livelihoods, protection, and climate resilience. ORCD employs around 1,800 staff, at least 30% of them women, and is an implementing partner for nine UN agencies.

Job Descriptions
We are inviting CVs for the position of GIS and Environmental Specialist for an integrated livelihoods, forestry, and rangeland management program across Badakhshan and Kunar. The role will produce the spatial evidence base that guides site selection, intervention design, and progress verification. The specialist will carry out GPS-tagged mapping of intervention sites, prepare spatial layers for forestry, rangeland, and livelihood activities, and conduct environmental screening to flag risks and safeguard requirements. The role will support rapid ecological assessment, degradation mapping, and the production of clear maps and figures for technical packages and reports. The specialist will work closely with the field team to ground-truth data and to maintain a verifiable geographic record of all activities. Accuracy, strong data management, and the ability to turn field data into decision-ready products will be central to this position.

Job Requirements
Candidates must hold a minimum of a bachelor's degree in GIS, environmental science, or a related discipline. A minimum of 5 years of relevant experience in GIS mapping and environmental assessment is required. Applicants must show practical experience in spatial analysis, environmental screening, and site selection. Proficiency with standard GIS software, GPS data collection, and the production of maps and spatial datasets is expected. Experience supporting field teams in remote and difficult terrain is an advantage. Fluency in Pashto and Dari is required, and proficiency in oral and written English is required. Candidates should be precise, well organized, and able to deliver reliable spatial products on short timelines while maintaining clear documentation suitable for technical review and verification.

Submission Guidelines
We require multiple CVs for this position. Only candidates who meet more than 95% of the stated requirements should apply through this link: https://forms.gle/pq7DXu1W3p9q844N6
Your CV must contain all of the following:
Full name
Physical address
Email address
Education
Experience (month and year, and a job description for every position)
Languages
References (at least two)
Use this template for your CV: https://docs.google.com/document/d/16xM-b1PeKOD6N5j4yVy9M70RHp_OpNHR/edit?usp=sharing&ouid=110577270346576244457&rtpof=true&sd=true In the recognition of their efforts, applicants sending their CV in this format might be prioritized if they meet the qualifications.

Submission Email
https://forms.gle/pq7DXu1W3p9q844N6
Apply

title: BHC Data Entry (Local Recruitment)
description:
About Action Against Hunger
Action Against Hunger (ACF) is a Non-Governmental Organization (NGO) that was created in France in1979. ACF has been active in Afghanistan in the medical, nutrition, food security, and water and sanitation fields since 1995.ACF improved access to health and nutrition services for the most vulnerable people, who live in remote areas without a localhealth system. In particular, the country team supported pregnant and breastfeeding women and children under five, who are atgreater risk of malnutrition. Nutrition programs rely on an integrated approach, addressing both primary and underlying causes, inorder to have a lasting impact on nutritional status. The country team worked at community level, in villages and at provincial level,strengthening the public health system. It also worked at national level to ensure reliable information about the nutritional situation reached the wider humanitarian community. Covid-19 prevention was integrated into all interventions and additional responseactivities were implemented, such as the disinfection of health facilities and public places, cash assistance, psychosocial support andthe distribution of hygiene kits to affected populations.

Job Description
Objective 1: Ensuring data management through quality-checking, entry, cleaning and first-stage analysis
Enter data in the appropriate templates, and share any challenges with the MEAL officer and MEAL Manager in a timely manner
Clean the entered data (assessment, PDM, etc)
Work closely with the MEAL and the Program team
Evaluate the time required to process data and feedback on progress in processing;
Check data entered;
Detect missing or redundant data and propose possible improvements;
Assist the MEAL manager and MEAL officer with database quality control and inform him/her of any technical problems.
Objective 2: Ensuring filing and archiving of data
Meet security and confidentiality needs for files concerning project activities, at all times
File the questionnaires and computerize the data.
Code the questionnaires according to the database.
Save the data entries regularly as well as the statistical results.
Support the development, maintenance and dissemination of complete information system including collections of good practices
Objective 3: Gather together the elements required for the analysis of data
Sort and cross-check data;
Create tables of statistics;
Draft reports of results based on data entered.
Ensure the analysis of data as needed for preparing report.
Make sure all the programme data is entered in centralized data base in systematic way to use to donor reporting.
Objective 4: Support in translation
Contribute to translation of documents related to program questionnaires (English <-> Pashto/Dari)

Job Requirements
Experience:
At least 2 years of working experience as data entry and MEAL field, in local or international organization
Experience in data entry, data cleaning, data analyzing, data collection, and translation
Required skills:
Proficiency in Microsoft Office.
Strong typing speed and data analysis skills.
Familiar with Nut registers
Good in team working
Able to travel in all Ghor districts
Languages:
Fluent in Dari (written, spoken, read).
Good commands in English (written, spoken, read).
Level of study:
University Degree preferably in Business Administration, Computer science, English literature, Economics or related social science Field.
Advanced computer literacy especially in software base data generating and produce report.

Submission Guidelines
Qualified and interested candidates should submit a cover letter and full CV with three Referees indicating the vacancy announcement to the address: Human Resources Department ACF office or can also be emailed to:
vacancies-gh@af-actionagainsthunger.org indicating the job tile and vacancy number of the position in the email subject line .
Eligible candidates are invited to apply by the earliest possible, until 18 Jun 2026.
Do not submit academic certificates with the application. These will be requested if the candidate is selected. Only short-listed candidates will be contacted for the written test/interview.
Action Against Hunger is an equal opportunity employer. We strongly encourage women and people with disabilities to apply. ACF has zero-tolerance policy on sexual exploitation, sexual harassment, and abuse (SEA)
Employment at Action Against Hunger is free of charge. Action Against Hunger does not charge any fee at any stage of the recruitment process to the candidates. Therefore, please refrain of offering money or any other form of compensation to anyone claiming that they can secure you a job or assist you in the hiring process and this is strictly against our recruitment policy.

title: Manager - BI & Analytics
description:
Role Summary
The Manager – BI & Analytics leads BI, reporting, and analytics for the marketing division, enabling data-driven decisions across revenue and customer initiatives.
The role focuses on developing BI strategies, creating dashboards and automated reports, and delivering insights through advanced analytics such as customer segmentation, churn analysis, and campaign evaluation.
It also ensures data accuracy, governance, and continuous improvement of BI tools, while collaborating with cross-functional teams and building a strong analytics team.

Duties and Responsibilities
The Manager – BI & Analytics role will be accountable to achieve the following objectives:
• Lead the Business Intelligence, reporting, and advanced analytics function for the marketing division, establishing standards, methodologies, and best practices for all BI activities.
• Develop and execute BI strategies aligned with commercial, customer, and revenue growth objectives, ensuring analytics initiatives directly support business priorities.
• Oversee daily, weekly, and monthly reporting on revenue, recharge, subscriber behavior, product performance, and market trends, ensuring timely and accurate delivery to stakeholders.
• Design and manage executive dashboards, automated reporting systems, and performance scorecards that provide actionable insights to senior leadership.
• Drive customer segmentation, customer lifetime value (CLV) analysis, churn analysis, and campaign effectiveness measurement to optimize marketing ROI and customer retention.
• Provide strategic insights to support product development, pricing strategies, and customer acquisition initiatives.
• Lead predictive analytics initiatives for forecasting revenue, customer trends, and market opportunities, enabling proactive business planning.
• Ensure data governance, reporting accuracy, and integrity across all BI systems, establishing quality controls and validation processes.
• Collaborate with Marketing, Sales, Finance, IT, and Networks teams for integrated decision support, breaking down silos and enabling cross-functional analytics.
• Manage and mentor BI analysts, reporting specialists, and data teams, fostering professional development and building analytical capabilities.
• Support senior leadership with strategic recommendations based on data-driven insights, translating complex data into clear business narratives.
• Monitor competitor performance, market intelligence, and regulatory reporting requirements, ensuring compliance and competitive awareness.
• Continuously improve BI tools, automation capabilities, and analytical methodologies, driving efficiency and innovation in reporting and analytics.
Key Deliverables:
• Executive Dashboards and Performance Scorecards
• Revenue and Customer Analytics Reports
• Predictive Analytics Models and Forecasts
• Campaign Effectiveness and ROI Analysis
• Data Governance Framework and Quality Standards
• Strategic Recommendations to Senior Leadership
• Automated Reporting Systems and BI Tool Enhancements

Job Requirements
Education:
• Bachelor’s degree in data science, Business Analytics, Statistics, Computer Science, Information Systems, or related quantitative field.
• Professional certification in Business Intelligence (e.g., Microsoft Certified: Data Analyst Associate, Tableau Desktop Specialist) is advantageous.
Experience :
• Minimum of 5 years' experience in business intelligence, data analytics, or related field, with at least 2 years in a managerial or team lead capacity.
• Experience working in the telecommunications, fintech, or financial services industry
• Proven experience working with senior management and executive stakeholders
• Experience using advanced SQL, BI tools, and data analytics platforms
• Track record of leading predictive analytics, customer analytics, and revenue optimization initiatives
Skills / physical competencies:
• Strategic Thinker, Problem Solver, Improvement Driver
• Results Achiever, Operationally Astute, Data-Driven Decision Maker
• Strong analytical and statistical skills
• Advanced SQL and database management
• Power BI, Tableau, or similar dashboarding platforms (would be a plus)
• Advanced Excel and data modeling
• Process automation and reporting optimization
• Telecom commercial performance analysis
• Project management and agile delivery
• Executive reporting and presentation skills
• Ability to communicate complex data insights at all levels
• Report writing and data storytelling
• Team management and people development
• Cross-functional stakeholder management
• Change management and continuous improvement
• Customer focused and commercially aware
• Attention to detail and quality orientation
• Stable work history and professional maturity

Submission Guidelines
Interested Afghan Nationals can send their applications and resumes (with three valid references) by June 18, 2026.
Please mention the name of the position you are applying for in your email subject line.
Applications received after the deadline and those that do not meet the requirements mentioned above will not be considered.
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for the interview(s).

title: Senior Full Stack Developer (Re - Announced)
description:
Role Summary
We are seeking a Senior Full-Stack Developer with deep expertise in PHP/Laravel, Node.js, and Python to design, develop, and maintain large-scale telecom applications and subscriber-facing platforms. This role involves building high-performance backend systems, customer portals, internal operational tools, and integrating with a wide range of telecom network elements. The ideal candidate has experience working in a Mobile Network Operator (MNO) or large ISP environment, where reliability, security, scalability, and low latency are critical.

Duties and Responsibilities
Design and develop systems such as SIM activation platforms, recharge/payment systems, VAS platforms, subscriber management tools, and operational dashboards.
Build APIs and services that integrate with core telecom systems such as HLR/HSS, OCS/IN, SMSC, PCRF, and provisioning systems.
Build scalable backend applications using Laravel, Node.js, and Python.
Develop high-performance REST/GraphQL APIs and background workers.
Implement queue-based processing using RabbitMQ/Kafka/SQS.
Design database schemas optimized for telecom workloads.
Build dashboards, admin portals, and subscriber interfaces using React, Vue.js, or Next.js.
Implement real-time data interfaces using WebSockets/SSE.
Integrate with telecom systems using REST, SOAP, SMPP, Diameter, and secured API gateways.
Work with both legacy and modern architecture.
Contribute to microservices design and high-availability distributed architectures.
Implement caching, sharding, throttling, and performance techniques.
Containerize and deploy applications using Docker and CI/CD pipelines.
Implement structured logging, tracing (OpenTelemetry), and metrics (Prometheus).
Enforce secure coding practices (OWASP/CIS).
Ensure regulator-compliant audit trails and access control policies.
Mentor team members and perform code reviews.
Work closely with core network, BSS/OSS, NOC/SOC, and cybersecurity teams.

Job Requirements
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Telecom Engineering, or equivalent experience. (Master's degree will be preferred)
Must have 3 to 4 years relevant work experience (2 years’ experience for a master's degree).
Fluent in one of the local languages (Dari, Pashto) and English (written and spoken).
Strong expertise in PHP/Laravel, Node.js, and Python frameworks.
Frontend experience with React/Vue.js/Next.js.
Strong SQL (MySQL/PostgreSQL) and Redis experience.
Experience building high-throughput, telecom-grade applications.
Knowledge of microservices, Docker, CI/CD, and secure API design.
Experience with Kafka/RabbitMQ, SMPP, or CDR/billing systems.
Cloud experience (AWS/Azure/GCP).
Familiarity with TM Forum Open APIs.
Strong work ethic, dependability, and the ability to manage multiple priorities and meet deadlines.
Demonstrated ability to lead and inspire a team to achieve goals and deliver high-quality results.
Ability to adapt to changing circumstances and lead the team through transitions and challenges effectively.
Understand the tools, equipment, and procedures specific to the job role.
Ability to work under pressure.
Good communication and interpersonal skills.
Able to travel to other provinces and work extra hours.
Strong analytical and critical thinking skills to address and resolve complex issues.
Follow the company's rules and policies.

Submission Guidelines
Interested candidates should fill out and submit the APPLICATION FORM with complete and correct information. To have access to the APPLICATION FORM, please copy and paste the link into your Web Browser.
https://forms.gle/nTLQfGzhZcKTDKLL9

title: 231-Senior Full Stack Developer (Re Announced)
description:
About Ministry of Finance
Directorate of Information Communication Technology at Ministry of Finance mainly focusing in the area providing data and voice services for MoF operations using highly-equipped data center, unified transmission system, and interconnected links via fiber and microwaves.
Directorate of ICT is providing reliable and secure platform for overall data and voice connectivity and access to MoF core application services in MoF HQs and sites.

Job Descriptions
The Senior Full Stack Developer will play a key role in leading and contributing to the design, development, and implementation of complex software systems and applications for the Directorate of ICT at the Ministry of Finance. The job requires strong skills in both front-end and back-end development, plus the ability to turn business needs into reliable, secure, and easy-to-use systems. The role also includes guiding the team and helping improve overall development practices.

Job Requirements
Key Responsibilities
The authorities concerned will carry out the following tasks and activities but not necessarily restricted to those:
Software Design & Development
Design, develop, test, and maintain enterprise-grade web applications using ASP.NET Core, C#, EF Core, and modern front-end frameworks (e.g., React).
Build and maintain RESTful APIs using .NET Core, applying CQRS and Microservices Architecture where appropriate.
Analyze, refactor, and enhance existing systems developed in C# .NET or PHP Laravel.
Apply Clean Architecture / Multi-layer Architecture, SOLID principles, and repository patterns.
Security, Quality & Performance
Implement secure coding practices in line with OWASP Top 10 and government ICT security standards.
Ensure unit test coverage of at least 80% And participate in integration and automated functional testing.
Conduct code reviews to ensure quality, maintainability, and compliance with international standards.
Identify performance bottlenecks and ensure high availability and reliability of applications and databases.
DevOps & Deployment
Create and maintain Docker configurations for containerized application deployment.
Support CI/CD pipelines and participate in release and change management processes.
Provide Swagger /OpenAPI documentation for all REST APIs.
Work with PostgreSQL and/or Microsoft SQL Server, ensuring data integrity and performance.
Agile & Collaboration
Actively participate in Agile/SCRUM ceremonies including sprint planning, reviews, and retrospectives.
Use tools such as Git, GitHub, Jira, and collaboration platforms to support efficient delivery.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams, stakeholders, and other departments to achieve ICT objectives.
Leadership & Continuous Improvement
Mentor junior developers and promote best practices in software engineering.
Recommend and implement solutions to automate and simplify business processes.
Perform risk assessments, identify mitigation strategies, and ensure compliance with ICT governance policies.
Prepare and maintain technical documentation, operational manuals, and user guides.
Reporting & Administration
Perform any other ICT-related duties as assigned by management.
Provide regular progress updates, reports, and risk assessments to management as per SLA.
Eligibility and Skill Sets:
The candidate qualification is:
Bachelor’s or master degree in computer science, information technology and other related fields.
5 years for master and 7 years for bachelor of computer since graduates, information technology and other related fields with experience in the enterprise level software development.
Full understanding and proven experience of coding regarding enterprise application projects using object-oriented paradigm with the help of Microsoft .net core and Entity framework (EF) Core. The design pattern for code management will be used either multi-layer architecture or clean architecture/ clean coding.
Understanding of implementing API gateways and microservices.
Understanding and proven experience in design patterns specifically repository patterns and clean architecture implementation in C#.
Preferred experience in implementation complex application development concepts such as distributed cashing, dependency induction, retry and scheduling mechanism, background/log running processes.
Coding review, SOLID principles and OWASP top 10 Web Application Security knowledge would be considered as plus point.
ASP.NET, Java and React, RabbitMQ, Quartz.Net, JWT and OAuth knowledge will consider as plus points.
Knowledge of business processing simplification in enterprise environment, with open-source platforms, and enterprise software applications.
Experience in the development and implementation of standards, procedures and guidelines to support operational processes.
Self-motivated with the ability to prioritize, meet deadlines, and manage changing priorities;
Strong interpersonal, communication skills and Experience in technical writing such as functional specification, technical specification, etc.
Experience in quality assurance & mitigation/ control, risk analysis and data analysis.

Submission Guidelines
Qualified applicants are encouraged to submit their CVs with a detailed application letter and contact details, no later than 19-Jun-2026 to below e-mail:
Please clearly indicate “position name/vacancy number in the subject line.
Please do not attach your education and working experience documents.

Submission Email
nta@mof.gov.af
Apply

title: Network Engineer (Kabul)
description:
Role Summary
The Network Engineer is responsible for the LAN/WLAN plan, documentation, configuration, maintenance, monitoring, and all hierarchical tasks that are coming through Manager-Network Infrastructures & Security.
The Network Engineer is under the direct guidance and supervision of the NIS - Manager/NIS - Supervisor to provide daily technical help to the Network Team Leader regarding the plan, implementation, and maintaining the AWCC upcoming/ongoing projects of LAN/WLAN to ensure the availability of the network/networking environment in AWCC offices and projects.

Duties and Responsibilities
Ensures effective functioning of the WLAN/LAN, Communication Support, Network Administration, and use of documenting tools focusing on the achievement of the following results:
Compliance with corporate WLAN/LAN maintenance and technology standards/policies, guidelines, and procedures for the AWCC office's information technology environment.
Identification and implementation of innovative uses of the WLAN and LAN which would enhance the AWCC project's effectiveness.
AWCC Project's plan deployment, configurations, and maintenance of the WLAN and LAN communications on ongoing/upcoming projects.
Report network operational status by gathering and prioritizing information and management projects.
Reconfiguration of new equipment and systems in WLAN and LAN and take corrective actions in case of failure.
Configure routing and switching equipment, hosted IP, and voice services.
Provide remote support to on-site engineers and end users/customers during installation.
Provide remote troubleshooting and fault find if the issues occur upon initial installation.
Liaise with project management teams, third-line engineers, and service desk engineers regularly.
Speak to customers via email and phone for initial requirement capture.
Troubleshooting and monitoring network problems: traffic, usage, and performance.
Implementation of backup and restoration procedures for all Juniper, Cisco, and other brand devices in the customer network's Core, AGG, and Access Layers.
Maintain the network access policies and controlling systems to ensure that all the corporate Access Layers and types of equipment are properly repaired and working to maintain satisfactory communications.
Maximize network performance by monitoring performance, troubleshooting network problems and outages, scheduling upgrades, and collaborating with network architects on network optimization.
Maintenance of logs of reported problems and corrective measures taken.
Administer the AWCC Projects corporate network to provide a stable and responsive environment.
Maintain up-to-date parameters of information for the network devices including network mapping, configuration backup, and so on.
Monitor the network availability 24/7 and report the stability to the Supervisor – NIS or Team Leader.
Troubleshoot WAN connection with any kind of point-to-point links to ensure stable connectivity between ISP and customer offices, remote sites, and AWCC regional offices.
The Network Engineer is a technology professional who is highly skilled in maintaining the connectivity of networks in terms of data, voice, calls, videos, and wire/wireless network service.
Experts with voice-over-internet protocol (VoIP) skills, which is a mix of voice, video, and knowledge on one network. A Network Engineer designs, tests, installs, and maintains both local VoIP systems in projects.

Job Requirements
Qualifications and Industrial Level Certification Requirements:
A Bachelor's degree in computer science/information technology or related fields is required.
Must have completed the JNCIA, JNCIS/CCNA, CCNA Wireless, and CCNP training.
Preferred certification holders (JNCIA, CCNA, CCNA wireless Network, and so on).
Work Experience Requirements:
3 to 4 years of experience in the Information Technology field.
Experience in PC support, remote communications, LAN/WLAN/WAN.
Excellent Technical skills and knowledge of Information technology Networks particularly Juniper, Cisco, Ubiquiti, and MikroTik switches, routers, and access points.
Knowledge of wireless LAN infrastructure - Wireless APs (802.11x) and experience managing wireless end-user devices.
Ability to meet deadlines, work under pressure, good negotiation and organizational skills.
Ability to provide 24/7 network services for AWCC Projects.

Submission Guidelines
The interested candidates should fill out and submit the APPLICATION FORM with complete and correct information. To have access to the APPLICATION FORM, please copy and paste the link into your Web Browser.
https://forms.gle/VpWNPaMGW3Q1ti3JA

title: Creative Social Media & Digital Content Manager
description:
About Galaxy Cars Auctions LLC
Galaxy Cars Auctions LLC is an international digital automotive platform focused on transforming the way vehicles are bought and sold through live and online car auctions. Our platform connects buyers, dealers, and sellers globally, providing a secure, transparent, and technology-driven marketplace for vehicle trading. Our mission is to simplify and modernize the automotive auction industry by combining innovation, digital accessibility, and customer-focused services. Through advanced online auction systems, AI-powered search tools, and seamless user experiences, we aim to create a trusted global ecosystem for buying and selling vehicles anytime and anywhere.
At Galaxy Cars Auctions, we foster a dynamic, fast-paced, and growth-oriented work environment where creativity, professionalism, and innovation are highly valued. We encourage team members to take initiative, think creatively, and contribute to building a modern global automotive brand with strong digital presence and customer trust.
Explore more about Galaxy Cars Auctions LLC through our official website:

Ensure readiness for audits, regulatory reviews, and compliance reporting.

description:
Role Summary
The Oracle Solaris System Administrator will be responsible for setting up servers, installing servers, creating and implementing Linux configurations, networking servers, and troubleshooting.
The Oracle Solaris System Administrator looks after design, installation, maintenance, and retirement of the systems, application server, WebLogic Server, data, security of the systems that are at the core of the organization, This role is responsible for the Technical and server Administration for infrastructure: Designing, building and implementing IT infrastructure; Proving timely and high-quality completion of projects (Tasks and request and ensuring the IT infrastructure environment is up to data through proactive auditing and Patch management.

Duties and Responsibilities
Install, configure, upgrade, maintain, and troubleshoot Solaris, Linux, and Windows servers, operating systems, applications, and related infrastructure.
Manage Production (PR) and Disaster Recovery (DR) environments, including load balancing, server migration, resource sharing, high availability, redundancy, backups, and business continuity solutions.
Administer user accounts, Active Directory, storage systems (SAN, NAS, Oracle ZFS), virtual machines, and data center infrastructure.
Monitor system performance, availability, security, backups, patches, upgrades, and disaster recovery readiness to ensure maximum uptime and operational efficiency.
Provide technical support, automate routine administration tasks, maintain documentation, and manage incident and outage reporting.
Administer Oracle FCCM, Oracle OBDX, Oracle WebLogic Servers, Smart Banking systems, and other enterprise applications.
Collaborate with IT Security, Network, and vendor teams to maintain infrastructure integrity, security, compliance, and performance.
Monitor data center operations, maintain standards and procedures, and recommend infrastructure improvements and technology upgrades.
Data Center Responsibilities:
Oversee daily health monitoring and reporting of core data center infrastructure.
Maintain documentation and event logs for processes and activities.
Provide recommendations for procuring new data center equipment as needed.
Keeping track of developing trends in data center technologies.
Collaborating with IT Security and network teams on cybersecurity and network efficiency.
Make sure the Data Center standard procedure followed by the team, units and vendor
efficiently.

Job Requirements
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.
Minimum 5 years of experience in Solaris, Linux, Unix, and Windows system administration within enterprise or data center environments.
Strong knowledge of Active Directory, PowerShell scripting, virtualization, storage technologies, server hardware, operating systems, networking, security, and disaster recovery.
Excellent communication, documentation, reporting, and problem-solving skills.

title: Sourcing & Quotation Analyst
category: Procurement and logistics, Information Technology, Business Development, Sales, Supply Chain Management
description: Role Summary We are hiring a Sourcing & Quotation Analyst to join our remote team. This is a night shift role. Your shift starts at 5:00 PM Kabul time and runs for 8 hours, aligned with international business hours. Your day will revolve around three things: finding the right opportunities, sourcing the right items from the right vendors, and building clean quotations that win. You will spend most of your shift on calls and emails with international vendors, so strong English and confidence on the phone are non-negotiable. This role is for someone serious. Someone who wants to grow, works hard without being chased, and takes pride in getting the details right. If you are looking for a relaxed 9 to 5, this is not for you. If you want to build a real career and you are willing to put in the work, we want to talk to you. Duties and Responsibilities Opportunity Research Search online portals and platforms for new tenders, RFQs, and product opportunities. Read the requirements carefully and understand exactly what is being asked for. Shortlist the opportunities that fit and flag them to management. Item Sourcing Identify the correct manufacturers and authorized distributors for each item. Verify part numbers, specifications, and compliance requirements before reaching out. Find backup vendors for every key item so we are never stuck with a single source. Vendor Communication Call and email vendors during your shift to request quotes, confirm stock, lead times, and shipping terms. Ask sharp follow-up questions when a quote is incomplete or unclear. Follow up consistently until you have everything you need. No half-finished work. Quotation Preparation Organize vendor pricing in Excel or Google Sheets and compare properly. Build professional quotations using company templates. Triple check every number, SKU, quantity, and date before anything goes out. Coordination and Records Keep clean records of all vendor communication, quotes, and follow-ups. Update internal trackers and CRM tools daily. Work closely with management on final pricing and submission strategy. Never miss a deadline. Discipline and Work Ethic Log in on time. Every shift. Role Summary
We are a live, high-volume digital distribution platform for mobile airtime and telecom services in Afghanistan. Our platform is already in production, processing a significant volume of transactions daily across all major Afghan mobile network operators. We are looking for an experienced Full Stack Developer based in Kabul to take ownership of our technical infrastructure and ensure continuity, stability, and growth of the platform.

Duties and Responsibilities
Take full ownership of a live production platform currently processing high-value transactions across Afghan telecom networks.
Maintain and improve direct API integrations with all major Afghan mobile network operators: MTN Afghanistan, Roshan, Salaam, AWCC, Etisalat, and others.
Manage USSD, IVR, and SMS gateway integrations for airtime top-up and telecom service delivery.
Develop and maintain backend systems handling transaction processing, routing logic, operator limit enforcement, and reconciliation.
Build and maintain front-end portals and dashboards for three user tiers: distributors, sub-agents, and end users.
Implement and maintain secure token management, credential handling, and IP whitelisting protocols required by operator APIs.
Ensure zero-downtime operation of a platform handling large daily transaction volumes.
Design and maintain idempotency and retry mechanisms to prevent duplicate or failed transactions.
Manage wallet and balance reconciliation across all operator networks.
Monitor system health proactively and resolve operator connectivity issues before they impact business.
Liaise directly with local telecom operator technical teams for onboarding, troubleshooting, and updates.
Maintain clear handover and technical documentation throughout the transition and beyond.

Job Requirements

3+ years of full stack development experience (Node.js or Python backend; React or similar frontend).
Proven experience maintaining or inheriting a live production system — not just greenfield development.
Hands-on experience with REST API integrations and authentication flows (OAuth2, token-based auth).
Experience with USSD, IVR, or SMS gateway integration is strongly preferred.
Familiarity with Afghan telecom operator systems and local network infrastructure is a significant advantage.
PostgreSQL or similar relational database experience.
Strong understanding of transaction idempotency, financial reconciliation, and error handling in high-volume environments.
Experience building multi-tier user portals (admin, agent, end-user levels).
Basic AWS or cloud infrastructure knowledge.
What makes you a strong candidate:
You are based in Kabul and have existing relationships or familiarity with Afghan telecom operators.
You have worked on airtime, mobile money, or fintech distribution systems in Afghanistan before.
You are comfortable taking over a live system with real financial consequences and managing it independently.

title: Information System Security Assistant Administrator
description:
Role Summary
The Information System Security Assistant Administrator is responsible for assisting the Information System Security (ISS) Administrator with the administration of the IT corporate firewall and deployment of security parameters to secure the IT corporate network and AWCC’s digital assets from unauthorized users and hackers by using his/her knowledge of information security principles and practices. He/she, under the direct guidance and supervision of the ISS Administrator and Network Infrastructures & Security (NIS) Assistant Administrator, will work closely to provide 24/7 systems security services for all IT domains, and IP data communications of AWCC IT/GSM platforms.

Duties and Responsibilities
Ensure that each department has proper/complete Service Level Agreements (SLA) based on the security policy of AWCC IT domain.
Provide security administration support for information systems and applications (e.g. UNIX, Windows, etc.) including Security Information and Event Management (SIEM) solutions.
Provide complex, technical, and enforcement of security directives, orders, standards, plans, and procedures at server sites.
Run periodic vulnerability identifications in software packages and related tools, to immediately highlight errors in systems configuration, and indicate the need for application fixes and patches, and other security-related changes.
Ensure that digital data on the systems/applications, databases, web servers, and operating systems are protected from unauthorized access and any outsider attacks.
Ensure that systems/applications, databases, web servers, and other related services are protected from exposures, based on procedures and manuals.
Ensure that all point-to-point/point-to-multi-point connections are secured from outsider attacks, and the best recommended protocols are in use to secure digital data transmissions.
Gather evidence on systems, using security scripts, port scanning tools, and checklists to provide analysis and mitigation of threats and vulnerabilities.
Deploy mechanisms that ensure all the outside to the inside of AWCC IT domains accesses are based on secure tunneling (e.g. VPN) and ensure the ease of access according to the service level agreements and manuals/procedures.
Advise related teams on the new attacks and exposures daily and give them sufficient solutions.
Develop complex technical and pragmatic assessments, to evaluate engineering and integration initiatives and provide complex technical support for access security policies, standards, and guidelines.
Identify and oversee the installation, modification, or replacement of hardware or software components and any configuration changes that affect security policies.
Assess the impact on the business unit/customer, caused by theft, destruction, alteration, or denial of access to information and report to related chain.
Develop, maintain, and help the implementation of in-depth Information Awareness programs through training and educating within AWCC.
Assess the knowledge level and capabilities of ISS team members based on the assessment, assisting in training and capacity building of the team members.

Job Requirements
A bachelor's degree in computer science/information technology or related fields (master’s degree is preferred).
3 to 4 years of experience in information systems security or related field.
Certified in any IT Security Certifications.
Must be certified in CCNA Security or JNICA Security and candidates with JNCIP-Sec or CCNP Security will be highly preferred.
The ideal candidate for this position would have an organizational background, with technical experience, related to the use of Microsoft, Juniper, Cisco, SQL, Oracle platforms, Linux, etc.
Working knowledge of Global Security Standards such as ISO 27K family and ability to check and ensure compliance of the deployed security measures with the mentioned security standards.
Ability to stay up to date on the latest intelligence, including hackers’ methodologies, to anticipate security breaches.
Ability to meet deadlines, work under pressure, good negotiation and organizational skills.
Ability to Provide 24/7 network services for the AWCC corporate environment, plus flexible work schedules, and occasional evening and weekend work.

Submission Guidelines

title: Internal Audit Officer
description:
About MISFA Ltd
The Microfinance Investment and Support Facility for Afghanistan (MISFA) is an apex organization that was established in 2003 to support the development of the microfinance sector through funding and technical assistance to microfinance institutions and to act as a catalyst for innovation. MISFA’s mission is to contribute to Afghanistan’s economic growth by developing a viable, inclusive financial sector for the poor, and the underserved small and medium enterprises. MISFA is wholly owned by the Government of Afghanistan-Ministry of Finance, and has been funded by a range of international multi and bi-lateral donors.
MISFA’s functions are accomplished through a number of departments and units, including Finance and Administration, Program Management, Monitoring & Supervision, Research & Innovation, Public Information & Communication, Information Technology and Human Resources.

Job Descriptions
The scope of the Internal Audit will be to:
a. Develop a risk-based annual internal audit plan in consultation with the Board/Audit Committee and senior management.
b. Conduct financial, operational, compliance, and performance audits across all departments of MISFA.
c. Identify weaknesses and gaps in internal controls and provide actionable recommendations.
d. Ensure compliance with laws, regulations, and internal policies.
e. Monitor the implementation of audit recommendations and track progress.
f. Assess the adequacy and effectiveness of internal controls, risk management, and governance systems.
g. Ensure the efficient and effective use of resources.
h. Follow up on the implementation of External Audit and previous Internal Auditors’ recommendations.
i. Ensure maintenance of financial and other key records.
j. Ensure management of fixed assets.
k. Ensure expenses are incurred in accordance with the established procedures.
l. Ensure Petty cash is managed as per the finance manual.

Job Requirements
· Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field (ACCA, CIA, or equivalent preferred).
· Minimum 3–5 years of internal audit experience, preferably in the financial or microfinance sector.
· Strong knowledge of IIA standards, risk-based auditing, and microfinance operations.
· Familiarity with Microfinance KPIs (e.g., PAR, OSS, write-offs, portfolio quality).
· Experience with internal controls, risk assessment, and compliance monitoring.

Submission Guidelines
The application package, acceptable in English language only, should comprise an up-to-date resume and cover letter explaining your interest and suitability for the position.
Interested candidates should submit their application package only by e-mail with the subject “Vacancy – Internal Audit Officer” to jobs@misfa.org.af . The application deadline is June 27, 2026.
Due to the expected large number of applications, only shortlisted candidates would be contacted.

salary: As per the Tdh salary scale
description:
About Terre des hommes (Tdh) Foundation
The Terre des hommes Foundation (Tdh), with headquarters in Lausanne and an office in Zurich, is the leading Swiss child rights organisation with more than 2000 employees worldwide. We stand together with children to uphold their rights, protect their lives and improve their well-being. We achieve this through innovative programmes focused on health, migration and access to justice, specially designed to have a positive and sustainable impact.
Tdh has been working in Afghanistan since 1995 and carry out projects related to Child Protection, Mother and Child health and Livelihood Programs in Kabul, Balkh, Kunar and Nangarhar provinces.

Job Description
Job Summary :
The Data Entry Clerk is responsible for accurately entering, organizing, filing, cross-checking, and verifying all documents received from health facilities and project areas. The role includes recording project-related information into designated database systems and generating reports in line with agreed formats. The Data Entry Clerk ensures timely and precise data entry for all project requirements and develops an action plan to maintain consistency, accuracy, and adherence to deadlines.
Main responsibilities:
Accurately enter project-related data (e.g., questionnaires, attendance lists, follow-up forms) into Access or Excel databases.
Ensure timely and consistent data entry of information provided by Health Facilities staff, project assistants, social workers, and animators.
Maintain data integrity and confidentiality of all beneficiary information in coordination with the line manager and relevant staff.
Collaborate with the MEAL Officer/Assistant/Manager in Kabul for support as needed.
Record and update beneficiary data for all project locations.
Support the team in preparing the Monthly report to the cluster, donor, and internal reporting.
Prepare and share weekly and monthly activity plans and reports with the line manager to ensure effective coordination.
Participate in conducting the Need assessment, baseline, and endline survey.
Participate in conducting the satisfaction survey when needed.
Monitor and verify beneficiary information and beneficiary vulnerability, distributions, and conduct Post-Distribution Monitoring (PDM) activities.
Support Complaint and Feedback Response Mechanism (CFRM) awareness during field visits and distribution events.
Assist in organizing and following up on project review and learning workshops as required.
Participate in team meetings and contribute to planning and scheduling of activities.
Facilitate effective communication and information sharing within the team and delegation.
Conduct field visits, when necessary, with prior approval from the line manager.
Perform any other tasks as may be requested by the line manager.

Job Requirements
Education :
University Degree, preferably in computer science or a related field
Experience / Skills :
Minimum two year of experience in data entry or a related role.
Languages:
Strong proficiency in local languages and good working knowledge of English
IT knowledge :
Strong skills in Excel, Word, and Kobo
Tdh General Code of Conduct and Ethical Policies :
Commits to promoting and complying with the Global Code of Conduct, systematically reporting any violations of the Code through Tdh's formal reporting mechanisms and dealing with any violations of procedures and processes appropriately.
Raises awareness of the Foundation of the risks of policy non-compliance, violence and abuse, and related rights, towards children, community members and our own employees.
Undertakes to comply with key ethical policies and guidelines, including the Safeguarding Policy, the Anti-Fraud and Corruption Policy, the Conflict-of-Interest Policy and other policies related to the prevention of terrorist financing and criminal activities, as well as workplace behavior.
Commits to putting values and principles into practice through exemplary behavior, in full compliance with the Code of Conduct, and always respecting established procedures and processes.
Commits to developing a compliant and enlightened management culture within the organization and in our work with children and the communities in which we operate.
References :
Please note that all job offers will be subject to satisfactory references and checks (criminal record and anti-terrorism funding check). Terre des hommes will ask the Human Resources of previous organisations to provide references on any findings of sexual exploitation, sexual abuse and/or sexual harassment as well as fraud and corruption, during employment, or incidents under investigation at the time the candidate left employment.

Submission Guidelines
Procedure:
Only complete applications (updated and accurate CV + covering letter) received through Tdh online application platform will be processed. It is essential that all information provided is complete, truthful and verifiable , as any discrepancies may affect your eligibility in the recruitment process.
Additional documents (diplomas, work certificates, etc.) will be requested at a later date.
Please note that
Only applications submitted through the online platform will be considered. Applications submitted by email, in person, or through other means will not be accepted.
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for the next stages of the recruitment process.
Tdh upholds the principles of equal opportunity, diversity, and inclusion, and maintains a zero-tolerance policy toward any harm, abuse, or exploitation of children or vulnerable adults by staff, representatives, or partners.
Female candidates and persons with disabilities are strongly encouraged to apply. Tdh values the diversity, perspectives and contributions each individual brings to the team.

title: Customer Care and Support
description:
Role Summary
Position Purpose:
The Customer Care and Support Officer is responsible for providing timely and professional support to customers, agents, merchants, and other service users across all approved NaqdPay channels, including mobile wallet, card, agent, merchant, POS, ATM, and digital platforms. This role ensures that customer inquiries, service requests, complaints, and transaction-related issues are handled accurately, efficiently, and in accordance with approved policies, service standards, and regulatory requirements. The officer contributes to enhancing customer satisfaction and trust by providing effective issue resolution, maintaining service quality, escalating complex cases when required, and ensuring a positive customer experience across all service channels. Additionally, the role supports customer retention by identifying recurring issues, providing feedback for service improvements, and promoting operational excellence in customer service delivery.

Duties and Responsibilities
Key Responsibilities
Handle customer inquiries, complaints, and service requests across all NaqdPay channels
Ensure timely and accurate resolution of transaction disputes, account queries, and technical issues.
Monitor service quality and escalate unresolved or complex cases to higher management or relevant departments.
Document all customer interactions and maintain accurate records of complaints and resolutions.
Provide feedback for process improvements and help update knowledge bases.
Support on boarding and training of customers, agents, and merchants on NaqdPay services.
Promote best practices in customer service and ensure interactions comply with regulatory requirements, internal policies, and service standards.
Identify recurring issues and suggest improvements to enhance customer retention and satisfaction.
Authority& Decision Right:
The Customer Care and Support is authorized to:
Respond to and resolve routine customer inquiries, complaints, and service requests.
Document interactions and report recurring issues or service gaps.
Escalate complex, unresolved, or high-priority issues to supervisors or relevant departments.
Guide customers, agents, and merchants on service usage within company policies.
Access customer service systems and tools based on role-based permissions.
The Customer Care and Support may not:
Override system rules, policies, or validation checks.
Approve financial transactions, settlements, or adjust customer balances.
Change service fees, commissions, or system configurations.
Exercise end-to-end control over transactions, onboarding, or exception handling without supervisory approval.
Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)
· First Response Time: Average time taken to respond to customer inquiries or complaints.
· Resolution Time: Average time to resolve customer issues or service requests.
· Customer Satisfaction (CSAT): Feedback ratings from customers after interactions.
· Case Escalation Rate: Number of cases escalated to supervisors or higher management.
· Accuracy of Information: Percentage of interactions where correct and complete information was provided.
· Compliance Adherence: Percentage of customer interactions following regulatory requirements and internal policies.
· Repeat Complaints: Number of recurring complaints or unresolved issues reported for the same customer or service.
· Knowledge Base Contribution: Number of updates or contributions to internal knowledge resources or FAQs.
· Service Coverage: Percentage of customer inquiries handled across all NaqdPay channels (mobile wallet, card, agent, merchant, POS, ATM, digital platforms).

Job Requirements
Required Qualifications & Experience
· Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.
· Minimum 2–4 years of experience in customer service, operations, or support roles
· Experience in handling customer inquiries, issue resolution, and operational process management.
· Familiarity with digital payment systems, wallet platforms, or financial services operations is preferred.
· Understanding of internal controls, compliance requirements, and segregation of duties principles.
· Experience supporting transaction monitoring, reconciliation, or settlement processes is an advantage.
· Strong attention to detail, process discipline, and commitment to service quality.
Competencies
· Strong operational discipline and attention to detail.
· Ability to work in a high-volume transaction environment.
· Risk awareness and ability to identify operational irregularities.
· Good analytical and problem-solving skills.
· Ability to follow structured procedures and controls.
· Effective communication and coordination with Finance, IT, and Compliance teams.
· Ability to work under pressure and meet strict operational deadlines.

Submission Guidelines
Interested candidates should submit their CVs via email to hr@naqdpay.af . Please ensure that the email subject clearly indicates the position title and the reference number as follows:
Position Title: Customer Care and Support
Reference Number: NaqdPay-CCSO-1
Only applications submitted following these guidelines will be considered .
Effective for two weeks

title: IT & Systems Security Officer
company: Afghan Barakat Financial Services Company ( Barakat Pay )
salary: Negotiable Based on Qualification and Experience
description:
About Afghan Barakat Financial Services Company ( Barakat Pay )
BarakatPay is an emerging Electronic Money Institution (EMI) project committed to delivering secure, innovative, and accessible digital financial services in Afghanistan. The company aims to strengthen financial inclusion and support the development of the country's digital payment ecosystem through technology, regulatory compliance, and operational excellence.
BarakatPay is committed to maintaining high standards of information security, corporate governance, risk management, customer protection, and regulatory compliance.

Job Descriptions
BarakatPay is an Electronic Money Institution (EMI) project being established in Afghanistan to provide secure, reliable, and innovative digital financial services. The company is developing electronic payment solutions for customers, merchants, agents, corporate clients, NGOs, and payment ecosystem partners under a regulated financial framework.
BarakatPay is seeking a qualified and responsible IT & Systems Security Officer to support the organization's technology infrastructure, system security controls, user access management, cloud coordination, technical documentation, and operational readiness. The position plays an important role in maintaining secure and efficient IT operations while supporting compliance with regulatory and internal security requirements.
The successful candidate will work closely with management, compliance, operations, technology vendors, and external service providers to ensure proper administration of systems, devices, security controls, and technical records.
Key Responsibilities:
• Support daily IT operations, system monitoring, and technical coordination activities.
• Maintain user access records, email accounts, system accounts, and access change logs.
• Assist in implementing password management, multi-factor authentication (MFA), device control, and access security procedures.
• Coordinate with cloud, hosting, network, SMS, domain, email, and software service providers.
• Maintain backup records, disaster recovery documentation, and system availability evidence.
• Support documentation and maintenance of IT policies, cybersecurity procedures, system inventories, and technical controls.
• Maintain records of IT assets including laptops, desktops, mobile devices, tablets, routers, SIM cards, and company equipment.
• Support employee onboarding and offboarding related to system access and technology resources.
• Monitor basic security alerts, suspicious activities, login issues, and device-related incidents.
• Assist with system testing, user acceptance testing (UAT), issue tracking, and reporting.
• Support regulator-facing IT and information security documentation.
• Ensure confidential company and customer information is handled securely.
• Assist in website, domain, email, cloud dashboard, and internal system administration activities.
• Maintain proper records of incidents, approvals, corrective actions, and system changes.

Job Requirements
Required Qualifications and Experience:
• Bachelor's degree or diploma in Computer Science, Information Technology, Software Engineering, Network Administration, Cybersecurity, Information Systems, or a related field.
• Educational qualifications must be obtained from a recognized institution and officially recognized or verified by the Ministry of Higher Education of Afghanistan. Foreign degrees must be supported by an equivalency certificate issued by the Ministry of Higher Education.
• Minimum two (2) to three (3) years of relevant professional experience in IT operations, system administration, network support, cloud support, cybersecurity support, software support, or technical operations.
• Basic understanding of cybersecurity principles, user access management, password controls, backups, MFA, antivirus solutions, firewalls, and system monitoring.
• Good computer skills, including MS Office, email systems, Google Workspace or Microsoft 365, PDF/document management, and troubleshooting.
• Good written and verbal communication skills in English.
• Fluency in Dari and/or Pashto.
• Ability to follow technical procedures, maintain records accurately, and handle confidential information responsibly.
• Strong organizational skills, attention to detail, and ability to work effectively under supervision.
Preferred Qualifications:
• Previous experience in a bank, financial institution, fintech company, telecom operator, ISP, software company, cloud service provider, or regulated organization.
• Experience working with cloud platforms, hosting environments, Linux/Windows servers, VPN solutions, firewalls, backup systems, or monitoring tools.
• Familiarity with Google Workspace, Microsoft 365, domain management, DNS administration, email security, and user account administration.
• Knowledge of ISO 27001, information security management, incident management, IT risk management, or audit-related documentation.
• Professional certifications in Cybersecurity, Networking, Cloud Computing, System Administration, or IT Support will be considered an advantage.

Submission Guidelines
Interested candidates are requested to submit the following documents:
Updated Curriculum Vitae (CV)
Copy of National ID (e-Tazkira)
Educational Certificates, Degrees, or Diplomas
Recent Passport-size Photograph
Relevant IT, Networking, Cloud, or Cybersecurity Certificates
Employment References
Applications should be submitted to:
Email: careers@barakatpay.af
Email Subject:
IT & Systems Security Officer – Application
For further information regarding this vacancy, applicants may contact us via WhatsApp.
WhatsApp: +93(0)700319789
Applications must be submitted through the above email address. For additional information or inquiries regarding this vacancy, applicants may contact us via WhatsApp.

careers@barakatpay.af
Apply

هدف این بست مدیریت دفتر ساحوی نقدپی در داخل بازار صرافی و حمایت از تمام فعالیت ‌ های عملیاتی تأیید شده نقدپی در سطح بازار است . مسئول موظف است مشتریان، اجنت ‌ ها و صرافان را ثبت ‌ نام کند، معلومات ابتدایی خدمات را ارائه نماید، به پرسش ‌ های مرتبط با تراکنش ‌ ها پاسخ دهد، مشکلات را ثبت کند، موارد لازم را به دیپارتمنت ‌ های مربوطه ارجاع دهد و گزارش ‌ های منظم را به مدیریت نقدپی ارائه کند .

Duties and Responsibilities
وظایف و مسئولیت‌ها:
مدیر دفتر ساحوی (Site Branch Manager) تحت رهنمود مدیر بخش عملیاتی فعالیت نموده و مسئولیت‌های ذیل را بر عهده خواهد داشت:
1) توسعه بازار و جذب مشتریان (Business Acquisition):
شناسایی، تحلیل وجذب مشتریان جدید( MSP ها، تجار، شرکت‌ها).
ایجاد و توسعه فرصت‌های تجاری در مناطق هدف.
معرفی خدمات و راهکارهای شرکت نقدپی برای مشتریان بالقوه .
پیگیری مستمر فرصت‌ها تا مرحله نهایی (conversion).
2) مدیریت مشتریان و اجنت ها ( Agents & customers Management):
ایجاد وحفظ روابط مؤثر با مشتریان، اجنت ها و ذینفعان.
مدیریت جلسات حضوری و آنلاین جهت توسعه همکاری‌ها .
پیگیری نیازمندی‌های مشتریان، اجنت ها و ارائه راه‌ حل‌ های مناسب.
3) تحلیل بازار و فرصت‌ها (Market Analysis):
انجام تحقیقات بازار و تحلیل رقبا در بخش فین‌تک و خدمات مالی دیجیتال .
شناسایی فرصت‌های جدید تجاری و پیشنهاد به مدیریت .
جمع‌آوری معلومات از بازار و ارائه گزارش‌های تحلیلی .
4) هماهنگی داخلی و پشتیبانی فروش (Sales Coordination):
هماهنگی با تیم‌های تخنیکی، عملیات، مالی و مارکیتینگ جهت پیشبرد فرصت‌ها .
هماهنگی و پیگیری مشکلات اجنت ها و مشتریان با دیپارتمنت مربوطه نقدپی .
اطمینان از تطبیق درست خدمات برای مشتریان جدید .
5) بازاریابی و تقویت برند (Marketing & Visibility):
حمایت از فعالیت‌های بازاریابی در سطح ولایات .
مشارکت در معرفی خدمات از طریق ایونت‌ها، جلسات و بازدیدها .
جمع‌آوری بازخورد بازار برای بهبود خدمات .
6) گزارش‌دهی و مستندسازی (Reporting & Documentation):
ثبت و مدیریت معلومات مشتریان، فرصت‌ها و فعالیت‌ها .
ارائه گزارش‌های منظم از فعالیت‌ها.
مستندسازی جلسات، توافقات و پیشرفت‌ها .
تحویلات (Deliverables):
دستیابی به اهداف تعیین‌شده در جذب مشتریان وتوسعه بازار.
ایجاد و مدیریت فعال فرصت‌های تجاری.
ارائه گزارش‌های منظم از فعالیت‌ها، فرصت‌ها و نتایج .
توسعه وحفظ روابط مؤثر با مشتریان و شرکا کلیدی.
صلاحیت‌ها و مهارت‌های مورد نیاز
شایستگی‌های عمومی:
توانایی توسعه بازار و ایجاد فرصت‌های تجاری در محیط‌های رقابتی .
مهارت قوی در برقراری ارتباط، مذاکره و مدیریت روابط با مشتریان و شرکا.
· مهارت قوی در ارتباطات و هماهنگی.
· برخورد مناسب و مسلکی با مشتریان.
· امانت‌داری و حفظ محرمانگی.
· دقت در مستندسازی و گزارش‌دهی.
· رفتار مسلکی با مشتریان، اجنت‌ها، صرافان و نمایندگان بازار.
· توانایی پیروی از پالیسی‌ها، طرزالعمل‌ها و الزامات تطبیق نقدپی.
مهارت‌های فنی و مسلکی :
آشنایی با مفاهیم فین‌تک، پول الکترونیکی ( E-Money )، وخدمات مالی دیجیتال.
درک عملی از سیستم‌های پرداخت، POS ، و اکوسیستم‌های مالی .
مهارت در تهیه پروپوزل‌ها، پریزنتیشن‌ها واسناد تجاری.
توانایی تحلیل بازار، شناسایی فرصت‌ها و ارزیابی رقبا .
مهارت در مدیریت فروش و پیگیری فرصت‌ها تا نهایی‌سازی.
مهارت‌های قوی در زبان‌های دری/پشتو و انگلیسی (نوشتار و گفتار) .
توانایی تهیه گزارش‌های منظم، دقیق و مبتنی بر داده .

Job Requirements
تحصیلات و تجربه:
حداقل لیسانس در رشته‌های اداره تجارت، مالی، اقتصاد، IT یا رشته‌های مرتبط .
حداقل ۳ – ۵ سال تجربه کاری در بخش توسعه تجارت، فروش، یا مارکیتینگ ( ترجیحاً در فین‌تک، بانکداری یا ICT).
داشتن تجربه عملی در جذب مشتریان، مدیریت روابط، و دستیابی به اهداف فروش .

title: System Administrator
description:
About UA Telecom
UA Telecom is a dynamic and rapidly expanding Internet Service Provider (ISP) in Afghanistan. with operations dating back to 2013. We deliver reliable, high-speed internet services nationwide, utilizing technologies such Wireless, Fiber Optic, Microwave, and VSAT Platforms. Our focus is on providing practical, efficient connectivity solutions tailored to the unique needs of businesses, organizations, and individuals. As we continue to expand, we are dedicated to making a tangible impact by creating local job opportunities and fostering long-term social development in Afghanistan.
For more information, visit www.uatelecom.af

Job Description
The System Administrator is responsible for the end-to-end management and security of the ISP’s core network infrastructures, including firewalls, routers, switches, and servers across multiple sites. This role supports customers by ensuring stable internet connectivity and reliable service through precise configuration, continuous monitoring, and rapid incident resolution. It also ensures maximum network uptime and peak performance across the infrastructure. Key responsibilities include managing link provisioning, bandwidth allocation, IP address management, and collaboration with upstream providers.
Key Responsibilities:
Network Infrastructure & Security
Install, configure, and maintain core routers, switches, and firewalls, ensuring scalability and adaptability to future growth.
Oversee the operation and firmware updates of primary and secondary firewalls across Main Office and Provincial sites, ensuring optimal performance and security.
Monitor spanning tree protocols on switches, ensuring data flows through primary point-to-point links and addressing any issues.
Protect CPE and PTP devices from external network attacks by blocking unauthorized ports and ensuring secure network access.
Identify customer bandwidth over-usage through weekly monitoring via Cacti servers, apply traffic shaping on CPE devices if limiters fail, and ensure no customer exceeds their contracted bandwidth.
2. Link & Bandwidth Management
Process link activations, upgrades, downgrades, and suspensions through CRM and coordination with the collections department, ensuring seamless integration with core firewall systems.
Administer the firewall system dedicated to hotspot users, generating new accounts and allocating bandwidth based on user requirements.
Record customers’ day and night bandwidth usage and update the records daily; monitor to prevent overload during peak hours, and request bandwidth upgrades for the main office and branches as needed.
Manage firewall time schedulers for day and night bandwidth allocations, optimizing network usage.
Oversee demo internet link connections, ensuring customer satisfaction during trial periods.
Administer customer requests for temporary bandwidth upgrades, ensuring seamless service delivery.
3. Server & System Maintenance
Conduct monthly HDD diagnostics on the primary server, ensuring data security and system health.
Maintain and update the Primary and Secondary Cacti servers to ensure better functionality and apply available updates.
Monitor UCRM server health and apply updates as they become available.
Monitor NTP server health, specifically for PTP, CPE, and the bandwidth scheduler.
Maintain EMCO server IP addresses and register new PTP and PTMP links for the alerting system in case of downtime.
4. IP & Device Management
Update IP allocation sheets for Main office and provincial branches, including devices license keys.
Monitor the locations of high-capacity devices and their connected base stations.
Maintain records of customers and sites’ equipment serial numbers for asset record.
5. Monitoring & Troubleshooting
Identify and resolve WAN, LAN, and WLAN issues promptly to maintain network stability.
Utilize Intermapper to assess microwave device capacities, ensuring no device is overloaded.
Update and monitor the WLAN virtualized Layer 2 map for new sector and switch installations, ensuring all PTP devices operate above 10 Mbps LAN speed by actively monitoring the alerting system.
Oversee the number of tickets created and closed by System/Helpdesk officers, ensuring timely and satisfactory resolution of technical issues.
6. Customer Support & Collaboration
Collaborate quarterly with the collections department to reconcile active customer bandwidth allocations, including day and night usage.
Provide online support to team members and customers for any technical-related issues, ensuring prompt resolution.
Upstream Coordination: Serve as the primary liaison with upstream providers to diagnose and resolve link issues promptly, staying engaged until full resolution to ensure uninterrupted service.
7. Compliance & Web Filtering
Continuously monitor web filter subnets and liaise with upstream providers to block URLs flagged by ATRA, ensuring permanent enforcement in full compliance with its official directives.
8. Additional Duties
Perform any other tasks as assigned by management to support network operations and service delivery.

Job Requirements
Required: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Network Engineering, or a related field. Preference will be given to candidates with a Master’s degree in a related major field.
With a Bachelor’s degree: minimum of 5 years’ experience in system or network administration; with a Master’s degree: minimum of 3 years, preferably within an ISP environment.
CCNA and CCNP certifications are highly preferred.
Strong hands-on experience with Cisco, MikroTik, and Ubiquiti (UBQT) devices.
Advanced knowledge of network protocols, including TCP/IP, BGP, OSPF, VLANs, and PPPoE.
Deep understanding of network security best practices and compliance with regulatory directives (e.g., ATRA).
Ability to analyze and resolve complex technical issues efficiently under pressure.
Excellent communication and reporting skills in Dari, Pashto, and English.

Submission Guideline
Interested candidates are encouraged to submit their applications by Jun 30, 2026 . To apply, please send your updated CV to vacancies@uatelecom.af
In the subject line of your email, please ensure to include the Vacancy Number and Desired Province. e.g: (UAT-VA-SA-2154-A - Kabul) .
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for the written test or interview process.

Submission Email
vacancies@uatelecom.af

title: Generative AI Training Intern (Paid)
description:
Role Summary
As a Generative AI Training Intern, you will learn how modern AI tools and models work and help us prepare, test, and improve AI-generated content. This is a hands-on, beginner-friendly role designed to teach you real, in-demand skills while you contribute to live projects. You do not need to be an expert today — you need to be reliable, curious, a fast learner, and able to communicate clearly in English.

Duties and Responsibilities
What You Will Do
Use leading generative AI tools to create, edit, and refine high-quality content in English — for our own products, marketing, and client work.
Write, test, and improve prompts so our AI consistently produces clear, accurate, and useful results.
Review AI output for quality, checking facts, tone, grammar, and clarity before it is published or shipped.
Help build and organize the data, examples, and guidelines used to train, fine-tune, and guide our AI models.
Support the testing and improvement of our new mobile apps and products as we build them, sharing feedback from a real user’s point of view.
Collaborate closely across teams — including social media, marketing, and communications — to turn AI work into posts, campaigns, and content that reach our audience.
Take on a variety of tasks as priorities shift; in a lean, fast-moving startup, everyone wears several hats and contributes wherever they are needed most.
Keep clear records of your work and report your progress regularly so the whole team stays aligned.
Stay curious, proactive, and creative — bring ideas, learn continuously, and apply feedback to make our work better.

Job Requirements
Who We Are Looking For
Computer science background or software engineering and programming.
Age 20 or older.
Good written and spoken English (this is essential — all work is in English).
Comfortable using a computer and the internet; able to learn new tools quickly.
Interest in artificial intelligence and a willingness to learn by doing.
Reliable, honest, well-organized, and able to meet deadlines without close supervision.
A stable personal computer or laptop and a reliable internet connection.
Bonus (not required): any prior experience with AI tools such as ChatGPT, Claude, or similar.
What We Offer
Paid internship — a monthly stipend of $150.
Remote work within a hybrid (on-site + remote) team, on a flexible schedule of around 8 hours per day.
Real, practical experience with the latest generative AI tools and large language models.
Mentorship and direct feedback from the Sahar AI team.
A certificate of completion and a strong reference for top performers.
The opportunity for a longer-term role for outstanding interns.

Submission Guidelines
There is no separate interview for this role. Your video presentation is your interview. To apply, please send the following together in one email:
1. Your CV / résumé — in English (PDF preferred), attached to your email.
2. A link to your video presentation (5–10 minutes, recorded in English). Upload your video to Google Drive or WeTransfer and paste the shareable link in your email. Please do not attach the video file directly, and make sure the link is set so that anyone with the link can view it. 3. Important: The video presentation is required. It is your interview — there will be no further interviews. Applications without a video will not be considered.
Send both to: SaharAI.company@gmail.com also keep hr@saharai.io in CC.
Email subject line: “Generative AI Training Intern — Application”
If you have any questions about this role, contact us at info@saharai.io .
Your Video Presentation (5–10 minutes)
Please record one continuous video of yourself speaking in English. You may use a phone or a computer — a quiet room, no mask and clear sound are more important than a fancy camera. Speak naturally and answer all five questions in order, then upload the video to Google Drive or WeTransfer and send us the link (see “How to Apply” above). We use this video to understand your English, your communication, and how you would handle real work.
Answer these five questions in your video:
1. Introduction and motivation. Introduce yourself — your background and education — and explain why you want to join Sahar AI as a Generative AI Training Intern and what you hope to gain over the six months.
2. Self-directed learning. Tell us about a time you taught yourself a new tool, software, or skill. How did you approach it, and what was the result?
3. Understanding the work. In simple words, explain what a generative AI model is and describe one realistic way it could help a business, an executive, or a public figure.
4. Practical thinking. Imagine you are asked to use an AI tool to write a short, professional message for a client. Describe the instructions (the prompt) you would give the AI to get a good result, and how you would check that the answer is accurate before sending it.
5. Reliability and work style. Describe your computer and internet setup, your weekly availability, and how you stay organized and meet deadlines when you work remotely and handle more than one task at a time.
How We Will Choose
We review every complete application fairly. Shortlisted candidates will be contacted by email. We evaluate each applicant on:
Your CV and relevant background or experience.
The quality and clarity of your video presentation.
Your English proficiency — both spoken and written.
Your communication skills and professionalism.
Your practical, real-work ability and problem-solving.
We look forward to meeting you. Good luck!
